myapps.title: My Launcher
myapps.content: A fully responsive personal portfolio website and blog designed to showcase my software engineering projects and technical articles. Developed with React and deployed using GitHub Pages, the site features a clean UI/UX, integrated Markdown support for blogging, and custom-built components

myapps.title: Siemens Capital/Vesys Bom Plugin
myapps.content: Customer Bom for 2D Harness Drawing on Siemens Capital/Vesys

myapps.title: Siemens Capital/Vesys Wire Plugin
myapps.content: Customer Wire list for 2D Harness Drawing on Siemens Capital/Vesys

myapps.title: Siemens Capital/Vesys Customer Query For Drawing
myapps.content: Customer Query for location bundle or harness items for 2D Harness Drawing on Siemens Capital/Vesys

myapps.title: C++ Programming: A Technical Guide (Turkish Edition) – Author
myapps.content: This book contains the knowledge I gained during my vocational high school and university years. It was requested for publication, but due to financial conditions, it could not be printed. Since I really wanted to publish and share it myself, I decided to share my book via GitHub. In terms of content, I explained the transition from entry-level programming to the intermediate level. I hope it will be a good publication for my friends who read or will read it.

myapps.title: Remote Control For My App
myapps.content: Remote configuration and version control management for the 'English Learn With Words' mobile application.

myapps.title: WeatherAPI
myapps.content: A modern weather forecasting application built with React, TypeScript, and Vite. Fetches real-time data from OpenWeatherMap API with a focus on Turkish cities

myapps.title: Learn English App
myapps.content: A cross-platform mobile application for learning English vocabulary through interactive word-matching exercises. Built with React Native, Expo, and TypeScript.

myapps.title: ToDoListApp
myapps.content: Interactive Task Management web app featuring task creation, editing, and deletion with a modern UI

myapps.title: Pet Care App
myapps.content: An OOP-based pet management system featuring detailed profile tracking, medical scheduling, and data-driven pet care logs.

myapps.title: Member Registe Discord
myapps.content: Automate your Discord server's registration process with custom welcome messages and staff-controlled member verification.

myapps.title: Server Commands Discord
myapps.content: Scalable Discord moderation system built with Node.js and Discord.js, designed for easy command integration and server control.

myapps.title: Tiktaktoe React
myapps.content: A modern Tic-Tac-Toe game built with React and Vite, focusing on state management, game logic algorithms, and responsive UI

myapps.title: Bank Queue System Core
myapps.content: Core queuing engine featuring dynamic ticket generation, priority algorithms for VIP customers, and automated service counter distribution logic.
